lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

This vehicle is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear on the exterior or interior and is in perfect mechanical order. All features are fully functional and the car has been exceptionally maintained.
The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic blemishes but no major damage. The interior is clean with light signs of use. The engine and transmission are in solid working order.

Experience the perfect blend of reliability and value with this well-maintained vehicle! It's in great shape, showing that it’s been cared for consistently over the years. The interior is clean and comfortable, and it drives smoothly, making it a fantastic choice for anyone looking for a dependable daily driver. This car is ready for its next adventure!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be functional. The engine has a severe oil leak and a persistent knocking sound, indicating significant internal damage. The body shows major signs of rust and several large dents, while the interior is heavily worn and in need of a complete restoration. It is being sold strictly as-is, ideal for parts or a dedicated project for a skilled mechanic.

This vehicle is in fair condition and has served as a dependable daily driver. The exterior shows typical signs of age, including several minor scratches, a few small dings on the passenger side doors, and some light paint fading on the roof. Inside, the cabin is clean but displays visible wear on the driver's seat bolster and some minor staining on the carpets. All major features are functional, though the infotainment screen has a small crack and the tires will likely need replacement within the next year. It is a solid, honest car that runs well and is priced to reflect its current cosmetic and mechanical state.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class. Maintained to an exacting standard, this specimen exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and flawless mechanical integrity. The interior remains in a pristine, untouched state, while the exterior finish retains its original luster. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle in truly unrivaled condition.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it runs like an absolute dream. You won’t find a single scratch or hiccup here; it’s basically perfect. It’s the ideal ride for someone who wants that brand-new feel without the brand-new price tag. Come take it for a spin, you’re going to fall in love!

Offering an impeccable E46 M3 in a condition that defines 'collector grade.' This example features the legendary S54B32 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333 hp through six individual throttle bodies. The high-revving naturally aspirated powerplant is mated to a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential. Mechanical integrity is paramount; the VANOS system has been overhauled, and the rear subframe has been professionally reinforced to exceed factory specifications. The chassis remains taut, riding on a perfectly dampened suspension with zero bushing play. Finished in Carbon Black Metallic over Cinnamon Nappa leather, the paint retains its factory depth with no discernible imperfections. Every component, from the rod bearings to the pixels in the instrument cluster, functions flawlessly. This is a turn-key investment for
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history included. Original paint and interior.

Presenting a truly exceptional, showroom-condition vehicle that defines the term 'mint.' This car has been meticulously maintained by a single owner and kept in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, chips, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the premium leather seats show no signs of wear, the original floor mats are spotless, and every electronic feature functions exactly as it did the

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in showroom-quality condition, every aspect of the exterior and interior remains in a pristine state, reflecting a history of meticulous care and climate-controlled storage. For the discerning enthusiast who demands perfection, this specimen stands as a definitive, investment-grade example of the marque.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in impeccable showroom condition, it has been curated for the discerning collector who demands mechanical perfection and aesthetic flawlessness. Every surface and component reflects a standard of care that transcends typical ownership, ensuring an investment-grade acquisition for its next steward.

Hey there! 👋 I am honestly so excited to show you this absolute gem. It’s been my pride and joy and is in truly stunning condition—seriously, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve kept it tucked away and pampered it since day one, so it’s spotless inside and out. If you’re looking for that 'new car' feel without the brand-new price tag, you’ve found it! Come see it for yourself, you’re going to love it! ✨

This E46 M3 is a concours-level specimen featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The high-revving valvetrain remains quiet, with the dual-VANOS system recently serviced to ensure optimal cam timing. Power is delivered via a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual to a variable M-differential lock. The chassis is impeccable, with no subframe fatigue and factory-spec bushings maintaining original suspension kinematics. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the exterior retains its deep factory luster with zero rock chips or clear coat degradation. A turn-key collector piece for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Single owner. Clean title. Garage kept. No mechanical issues.

Presenting a truly exceptional specimen that redefines the standard for pre-owned excellence. This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, chips, or swirl marks, while the interior remains in a factory-fresh state, featuring supple, unscuffed leather and untouched trim. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, accompanied by a comprehensive service dossier and remarkably low original miles. Every switch, dial, and electronic feature operates with the crisp precision of a new car. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a collector-grade vehicle that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did when it first rolled off the assembly line.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard that defines the mint designation. Every facet of this automobile reflects a commitment to preservation, offering a showroom-quality aesthetic and mechanical integrity that satisfies the most discerning collector. This is a definitive acquisition for those who demand excellence without compromise.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear or mechanical compromise. Meticulously preserved and rigorously inspected, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You've seriously got to see this beauty in person. It’s in absolutely pristine condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, so there isn't a scratch or a speck of dust to be found. It’s been my pride and joy, but it’s time for it to find a new home. Come take it for a spin, I promise you’re going to fall in love with it!
Used car. Condition: mint.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Original paint. Interior like new. Full service history included.

This vehicle is a true collector's dream, maintained to a standard that rivals its first day on the showroom floor. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero paint chips, scratches, or door dings. Every panel gap is factory-perfect, and the alloy wheels are completely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine condition; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no signs of creasing or wear, and all electronic systems—from the navigation to the climate control—function flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is impeccable, backed by a comprehensive service history and a meticulously detailed engine bay. It has been strictly garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment and has never been exposed to inclement weather. This is a rare opportunity to own a turn-key masterpiece that looks, feels, and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

Presented for your consideration is an exceptional vehicle maintained to an impeccable standard. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior that retains its original showroom luster. Mechanically peerless and rigorously inspected, it offers a superior driving experience for the discerning collector. Rare in this state of preservation, it stands as a testament to meticulous ownership.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior profile and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Mechanically beyond reproach, this unit represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a truly peerless driving machine. Every detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets our rigorous criteria for excellence.

Hey there! 🌟 I am beyond excited to show you this absolute beauty. If you're looking for a ride that’s in truly pristine, showroom-quality shape, you’ve found it! It’s been loved and meticulously cared for, so it looks and drives just like it’s brand new. Seriously, not a single flaw to be found! This is the perfect chance to get a top-tier car that feels fresh off the lot. I'd love for it to go to a great new home—feel free to message me!

This E46 M3 is a collector-grade specimen featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, factory-rated at 333 hp with individual throttle bodies and dual VANOS variable valve timing. The powertrain is mated to a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a mechanical limited-slip differential, ensuring an analog driving experience. This vehicle has undergone comprehensive preventative maintenance, including rod bearing replacement and professional rear subframe reinforcement to address common chassis vulnerabilities. The exterior retains its original factory finish with exceptional luster, while the interior features pristine Nappa leather and intact bolsters. Mechanically synchronized and cosmetically flawless, this M3 represents a turn-key investment for the discerning enthusiast.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Maintenance records included.

Presenting an absolute masterpiece for the discerning collector: a vehicle that truly embodies the definition of 'mint' condition. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, maintaining its flawless factory paint and deep, mirror-like luster. Every body panel is perfectly aligned, free of even the smallest stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium upholstery is supple and pristine, the dashboard is untouched by the sun, and the original carpets have been protected since day one. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, performing with the precision and smoothness of a brand-new car. It comes with a comprehensive, no-expense-spared service history and has been handled with obsessive care by a single enthusiast owner. From the spotless engine bay to the untouched alloy wheels, every detail reflects a life of pampered luxury. This is a rare opportunity to own a verified time capsule that looks, feels, and drives as if it just left the assembly line.

Presenting a masterfully preserved vehicle that exemplifies the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, boasting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original luster. Meticulously serviced and clinically maintained, it offers unparalleled mechanical integrity and aesthetic perfection. For the discerning buyer seeking an uncompromising example of this model, this offering represents a rare acquisition opportunity.
